Our Story

A family kitchen, run by Will and Gulya.

Gulya's began as a humble pelmeni take-away in the Germasogeia tourist area — a tiny operation built around hand-folded dumplings and word-of-mouth. When the queue outgrew the counter, we moved a little further down the coast to the Navaria Complex on Amathountos Avenue, where the small, cosy restaurant has been ours ever since.

✦

We cook two cuisines we love — Russian and Uzbek — and we cook them with heart. Borscht, solyanka, pelmeni and Olivier sit alongside plov, manti, samsa and the cheburek people keep coming back for. Vegetarian guests are looked after, and there's something on the menu for most diets. Nothing here is for show; we'd rather you finish your plate and stay for tea.

A word from the owners

"We're always happy to meet new people and introduce them to our cuisine." — Will & Gulya

What Guests Say

Loved by locals and travellers alike.

4.5 ★★★★½
based on 406 Google reviews
★★★★★

An incredible meal — we tried the borscht and the pelmeni and both were rich, authentic and beautifully balanced. The staff couldn't have been more welcoming. Easily one of the best dining experiences we've had in Limassol.

Visitor reviewvia Google
★★★★★

An unexpected treasure on the island. Excellent solyanka, fantastic cheburek, beautifully made pelmeni — probably the best Russian cuisine in Cyprus. We'll be back.

Visitor reviewvia Tripadvisor
★★★★★

Will and Gulya are wonderful hosts — attentive without being intrusive. The vegetarian options are generous too, which made a difference for us. Genuine, warm, family-run cooking.

Visitor reviewvia Google
★★★★★

Don't be fooled by the modest look — the food is exceptional. The Beef Stroganoff completely won me over and I'm now working through the rest of the menu, one dish at a time.

Visitor reviewvia Google
★★★★★

A wintry day, a bowl of borscht and a bowl of solyanka — exactly what we needed. The menu is full of Russian and Uzbek specialities and we're already planning the next visit.

Visitor reviewvia Tripadvisor
★★★★★

Truly memorable. We ordered far too much because everything was so good — special mention to the staff and the manager, who looked after us beautifully. Highly recommended.

Visitor reviewvia Google
